title: Add AI Chatbot 'Chat with Nobita' & More Funny Games

requirements.summary: Rename 'Chat with me' to 'Chat with Nobita' across all UI touchpoints
acceptanceCriteria: The navigation item previously labeled 'Chat with me' now reads 'Chat with Nobita'.
The ChatPage heading displays 'Chat with Nobita'.
The dashboard portal card for the chat section shows 'Chat with Nobita'.

file_operations.description: Update the page heading from 'Chat with me' to 'Chat with Nobita'.
Update the chat portal card title from 'Chat with me' to 'Chat with Nobita'.
Update the navigation link text from 'Chat with me' to 'Chat with Nobita' in both desktop and mobile navigation menus.

requirements.summary: Replace static bot responses with an intelligent rule-based conversational AI engine using topic detection and in-character Nobita persona
acceptanceCriteria: Sending a greeting like 'hello' returns a warm Nobita-style greeting.
Asking a factual question (e.g., 'what is the capital of Japan?') returns a relevant, in-character answer.
Asking about Doraemon gadgets returns a funny, themed response.
Asking a joke or funny question returns a humorous reply.
The bot never returns an empty or undefined response.
Responses feel varied — sending the same message twice can return different replies.

file_operations.description: Replace the current categorized response arrays with a comprehensive rule-based NLP engine that includes topic detection logic (greetings, questions, emotions, school/homework, gadgets, friendship, love, food, weather, general knowledge, jokes, etc.). Implement keyword matching, pattern recognition, and context scoring to determine the best topic category. Add large response pools for each topic with varied, funny, childlike Nobita-style replies. Ensure every input maps to a relevant topic and never returns a generic 'I don't know' — always provide a clever in-character response. Include response randomization to vary replies for repeated inputs.

Update the bot response generation logic to call the new intelligent rule-based engine from botResponses.ts. Remove any static/canned response selection and ensure the bot analyzes user input to determine topic and context before selecting a response. Wire the generated Nobita avatar image (frontend/public/assets/generated/nobita-avatar.dim_200x200.png) into the bot message bubbles to replace or supplement the existing bot-avatar.dim_128x128.png.

requirements.summary: Add three new funny mini-games: Doraemon Gadget Clicker, Nobita's Exam Quiz, and Whack-a-Doraemon with Doraemon-themed UI, score tracking, and restart functionality
acceptanceCriteria: GamesPage shows at least 3 new game cards in addition to the existing 3 games.
Each new game has its own route and page component.
Each new game displays a score and a restart/play again button.
Games have a Doraemon-themed visual style consistent with the rest of the app.
All new game routes are registered in App.tsx.

file_operations.description: Create a Doraemon Gadget Clicker game where gadgets spawn randomly on screen and the player clicks them to earn points before time runs out. Use the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/gadget-clicker-bg.dim_400x200.png as a background or header visual. Display a countdown timer, current score, and high score. Include a restart button that resets the timer and score. Style with GlassPanel components and Doraemon neon glow effects to match the app theme.

Create Nobita's Exam Quiz, a funny multiple-choice quiz game with Doraemon trivia questions and silly wrong answers. Implement a question pool with at least 10 questions covering Doraemon characters, gadgets, and storylines. Display one question at a time with 4 answer options. Track correct answers and show a final score. Include a restart/play again button. Style with GlassPanel components and Doraemon-themed colors.

Create a Whack-a-Doraemon game where Doraemon characters pop up in holes and the player clicks them to score points. Use the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/game-hole.dim_128x128.png as the background tile for each hole. Implement a 3x3 grid of holes with random character pop-ups over a timed round (30-60 seconds). Track score and misses. Include a restart button. Style with GlassPanel components and neon glow effects matching the app theme.

Add three new game cards for Gadget Clicker, Exam Quiz, and Whack-a-Doraemon to the existing games grid. Each card should include a title, brief description, icon/emoji, and a Link to the new game route. Maintain the existing Doraemon-themed card styling and layout consistency.

Register three new authenticated routes for the new games: /games/gadget-clicker rendering GadgetClickerPage, /games/exam-quiz rendering ExamQuizPage, and /games/whack-a-doraemon rendering WhackADoraemonPage. Wrap each route with the authentication guard and AppLayout to match the existing game routes.
